name: approach_object
description: Move one hand TCP downward from pregrasp to the grasp pose near an object with optional explicit end-effector orientation.

parameters.object_x/object_y/object_z: Object position in MuJoCo world coordinates.
parameters.object_body: Optional MuJoCo body name used instead of explicit object position.
parameters.object_site: Optional MuJoCo site name used instead of explicit object position.
parameters.object_geom: Optional MuJoCo geom name used instead of explicit object position.
parameters.grasp_offset_x/grasp_offset_y/grasp_offs: Required offset from object center to grasp TCP target.
parameters.target_quat_wxyz: Optional explicit TCP target orientation as quaternion [w, x, y, z]. Overrides lock_orientation/current orientation.
parameters.lock_orientation: If true and no explicit orientation is provided, preserve current TCP orientation during the move.
parameters.orientation_weight: Pose IK orientation weight when target orientation is used.
